# Pull Request Template

## Description

<!-- Briefly describe the changes made in this PR -->

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] This change requires a documentation update
- [ ] Refactoring (no functional changes)
- [ ] Script-only changes (no gameplay impact)

## Testing

- [ ] Tested locally in Unity Editor
- [ ] Tested in Play mode
- [ ] No new warnings introduced
- [ ] Existing tests still pass (if applicable)

## Code Quality

- [ ] Code follows project style guidelines
- [ ] No TODO comments left in code
- [ ] Proper error handling implemented
- [ ] No hardcoded values (use constants/config)
- [ ] Variables/functions properly named

## Documentation

- [ ] Code commented (if necessary)
- [ ] README updated (if needed)
- [ ] API documentation updated (if applicable)

## Related Issues

<!-- Link any related issues using 'Fixes #123' or 'Relates to #123' -->

Fixes #
Relates to #

## Branch Information

- [ ] Branch created from: `main` / `develop`
- [ ] Target branch: `main` / `develop`

## Screenshots / Videos

<!-- Add screenshots or videos of the changes (if applicable) -->

## Additional Notes

<!-- Any additional information reviewers should know -->

---

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the style guidelines of this project
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my code
- [ ] I have commented my code where necessary
- [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works
- [ ] New and existing unit tests pass locally with my changes
- [ ] Any dependent changes have been merged and published in downstream modules
